title: Baby Bio Citrus Food, 175ml - Citrus Plant Food for Healthy Growth and High Potassium for Better Fruit Yield - Year Round Care Concentrate Fertiliser - Fruit Tree Aid Spray
features: HEALTHY CITRUS: A well balanced feed, with high levels of potassium for bigger and better fruit yield
YEAR ROUND: This year round feed ensures your citrus plant gets all of its essential nutrients. There is no need for separate summer and winter feeds
INDOOR AND GARDEN: Suitable for home use, either in the house, conservatory, or greenhouse
BEAUTIFULLY BLOOMING: Allows flowering citrus plants to bloom to their full potential, ensuring vibrant and fragrant flowers
NOTE: This product does not have an expiry date, the date on the product is the manufacturing date
description: From the manufacturer TRUSTED NUTRITION FOR RICH FLOWERING & DELICIOUS FRUITS HIGH CONCENTRATION A concentrated formula—175ml makes up to 70L of plant-nourishing solution, delivering incredible value and care for your citrus plants NUTRIENT-RICH FORMULATION This strong, nutrient-rich formulation is packed with the highest levels of nitrogen (N) and potassium (K) to support exceptional plant health. Designed to replenish essential nutrients efficiently, it provides the perfect balance for plants to flourish, delivering visible results in both beauty and productivity. YEAR-ROUND CARE Baby Bio Citrus Food is expertly formulated to support citrus trees through every season, from the cold of winter to the warmth of summer. It eliminates the need for separate seasonal feeds, providing consistent nourishment throughout the year.
